> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws --skill aws-iam --skill aws-serverless -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/aws-iam`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/aws-iam.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws --skill aws-iam --skill aws-serverless -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

AWS IAM focused skill within Agent Toolkit for AWS. Helps agents with IAM concepts, policy authoring, least-privilege, condition keys for agents, roles, and secure access patterns when building/deploying on AWS. Part of aws-core coverage (service selection, IAM, etc).

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws --skill aws-iam -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` (or via aws-core plugin install). status=inspect-then-install; selector=named/group. MCP config (e.g. uvx mcp-proxy-for-aws pinned) often required for full capability. See AWS user guide.

## Upstream Maintainer

aws (Amazon Web Services, github.com/aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws). Apache-2.0. Official GA-supported toolkit (successor to AWS Labs MCP/skills). Includes managed AWS MCP Server (full 300+ service API, sandbox exec, docs search), plugins bundling MCP+skills, curated skills/, rules/. Enterprise: CloudWatch, IAM agent-specific condition keys, CloudTrail. Requires AWS creds + uv for some paths. 886 stars.

## Comparable Alternatives

Official AWS docs + CDK/CloudFormation/SAM/Serverless Framework guidance without agent layer; other cloud provider agent toolkits or IaC skills (e.g. terraform-skill); general devops or security skills focused on IAM/policies; direct use of AWS CLI/Console + agent code intelligence.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
